changelog: NEW (DEV ONLY): One-tap 'Send diagnostic report' button on Diagnostics screen (Settings → Diagnostics → bug-report icon). Bundles device info, free memory, free disk, recent breadcrumbs, plus the latest crash + ANR logs into a single snapshot tagged kind=diagnostic and ships it to the server. Use this any time something feels off — buffering, freezing, weird focus — even if the app didn't actually crash.
TV + Mobile parity: same yellow bug-report button on both flavours.
All v1.44.3 ANR-watchdog + Sports stability fixes still active.
